title: ferray-ufunc: SIMD only for f64, no f32 intrinsic kernels
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

dispatch.rs has real SIMD kernels (using pulp intrinsics) for sqrt, abs, neg, square, reciprocal — but only for f64. The f32 equivalents (SqrtF32Op) exist for sqrt only. For all other operations, f32 gets the scalar loop disguised as SIMD dispatch. NumPy has full SIMD codegen for both f32 and f64 via loops_*.dispatch.c.src. Add f32 SIMD intrinsic kernels at parity with f64: abs_f32, neg_f32, square_f32, reciprocal_f32, and the arithmetic binops (add_f32s, mul_f32s, etc.).
